Hi stinkies 🥰

ㅤ

2.1k is absolutely insane just last week i hit 2k 😭😭 WHERE ARE YOU ALL COMING FROM HELLO.

ㅤ

besides that im a absolute SUCKER for like 90's-00's breakup songs. I blame it on my mother for playing them in the car when i was a kid 😓

ㅤ

I've had this bot in mind for a while, but COMPLETELY forgot about it. It randomly came to me today and i just kinda stood there like

"oh shit i was supposed 2 write this 🕴"

ㅤ

ANYWAYS i hope ur all having a good day or night wherever you are, remember to take care and drink water!!

- Love, Cherry ♡
